title: Hand Drawn Animation Film Pastoral Fantasy Scene AI
sourceTitle: Hand Drawn Animation Film Pastoral Fantasy Scene AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Hand-drawn animation film background for a small village bakery opening before sunrise after summer rain, preserving a gentle pastoral fantasy story moment. Subject: a young apprentice carrying a basket of warm bread beside a patient old dog becomes the story anchor, interacting naturally with the environment and carrying the emotional direction of Classic hand-drawn animation film background with soft watercolor transitions, delicate natural brushwork, paper texture, poetic pastoral fantasy, gentle coming-of-age adventure mood, and cinematic painted-background. Scene: a quiet cobblestone lane with wet reflections, flower boxes, steam from bakery windows, distant hills and pale morning clouds provides the lived-in natural setting with soft countryside detail, air, wind, light, and quiet fantasy realism. Composition: Three-layer animation background composition: foreground story anchor, middle natural environment, and distant sky, hills, town, road, river, forest, or clouds; keep the subject medium-sized so the environment can tell the story. Signature Elements: At least one concrete story instant, natural character-environment interaction, lush but uncluttered background detail, subtle fantasy encounter, soft wind, sunlight and shadow, nostalgic countryside atmosphere, and a clean durable animated-film still quality. Fixed source details: Emotional Tone: warm, hopeful, quiet, slightly nostalgic. Style: Classic hand-drawn animation film background with soft watercolor transitions, delicate natural brushwork, paper texture, poetic pastoral fantasy, gentle coming-of-age adventure mood, and cinematic painted-background depth. Color Palette: Natural restrained bright colors with warm summer greens, soft sky blues, gentle earth tones, watercolor bleeding, low-saturation warmth, and clean layered atmospheric perspective. Lighting: Soft sunlight, wind movement, leaf-shadow dappling, warm highlights, gentle natural shadows, visible air depth, and quiet cinematic glow. Materials: Hand-painted watercolor and gouache-like paper texture, delicate sketch lines, soft cloud edges, layered foliage, grass detail, weathered wood, stone paths, puddles, and tactile countryside surfaces. Typography: 用户输入字段包括：主题词/主标题、画幅比例、主体角色、场景环境、情绪倾向、是否需要文字、可选补充语境、可选禁用元素。; if text is requested, keep it very small, warm, simple, and integrated in a corner or bottom area. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
